name: Fried Cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1 Peel the cucumber and cut it lengthwise into 1/4 inch slices. Pat the slices dry between paper towels.
2 Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3 Dip the slices first in cracker crumbs, then in a beaten egg, and again in crumbs.
4 Deep fry in hot oil at 390 degrees Fahrenheit until delicately browned.
5 Drain on absorbent paper.
